text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day where Haru Urara finally starts
her training for the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She insists on taking first place. And it shows with
just how much enthusiasm she has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At least, that's what I thought. However...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's you, Trainer! It's a pleasure to start
training with you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm the best at doing my best! You have
nothing to worry about!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm ready to run!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hup, hup, hup! Phew... That's one lap down.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: On it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: A butterfly! It's so big and pretty!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh look! It's fluttering off toward the grass over
there!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, where are you going! Wait for meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara bolts off. I think to chase after her,
but I wonder if this is part of her plan for training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to trust her and wait and see until she
comes back...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...But she doesn't! Something must have
happened. I have to find her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (She's not here...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Or here...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Or here!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look almost everywhere for her, until...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm beat! Time to take a break!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've found Haru Urara! But she's covered in mud...
What happened here?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Trainer! Fancy meeting you here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you going to play tag with Mr. Fish, too?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her to explain. It seems that after she chased
the butterfly, she found herself by the river and
started to play tag with a fish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't really understand, but maybe this is all a
part of a unique training regimen of hers?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I think I found the king of the river! And
I almost caught him too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Never mind. She was just goofing off.
choice_data_list: So, how about we get back to training?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? But I already did it, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I did it... Or did I?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: AH! I just saw a huge fish! That must be the river god! Let's go find it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Of course! Getting first place is so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run a lot, get first place a lot, and have a
lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I mean, that's why you became my trainer, right?
You're gonna help me make that happen!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So I'm gonna try my hardest from now on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Haru Urara really does want to try
her best. As long as she has that mindset, I'm sure
she'll reach her dreams of taking first place. But...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! That cloud looks like a carrot! It looks so
tasty! Wait for meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...First of all, I need to get her to focus on her
training. Then I'll think about what comes next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In any case, Haru Urara's training starts today!
